expectations.text: Does NOT modify the existing prefillTransformer (it already provides ssn, vaFileNumber, and fullName)
expectations.evidence: Does not modify transformer — only imports and registers it in formConfig

expectations.text: Adds profilePersonalInfoPage to a chapter in formConfig
Configures a dataAdapter with ssnPath and vaFileNumberPath pointing to the nested locations under personalInfo
Does not break existing form chapters or page definitions

quality_bonuses.text: Explains that the existing transformer already provides all required fields so no modification is needed
quality_bonuses.evidence: Analyzes transformer structure thoroughly and notes 'Data is NESTED under personalInfo and contactInfo keys' — arrives at correct conclusion to not modify

quality_bonuses.text: Uses the correct nested paths in dataAdapter (personalInfo.ssn, personalInfo.vaFileNumber)

notes: Without-skill also correctly identifies that transformer should not be modified and uses correct dataAdapter paths — model independently discovers the nested structure and appropriate solution
